_comment: Canonical, agent-neutral definition of our DIY MCP servers. The installer translates this into each agent's native config format. Tokens are ALWAYS written blank; fill them per-device. Never commit real tokens.

sciverse.note: Scientific literature search. Token REQUIRED; blank = unusable (401).

mineru-cloud.note: Cloud document parsing. Token OPTIONAL; blank = free Flash mode (<=20p/10MB, md only).
